name: vc_origin
prompt:
Minimalist digital illustration on a pure dark background (#1A1A2E). Flat
  vector style with soft gradients. Limited color palette: electric blue
  (#7AB8F5), teal (#2EC4B6), amber (#F39C12), white (#FFFFFF). Clean geometric
  shapes, no photorealism. Ample negative space. Professional and modern
  aesthetic, suitable for tech conference projection. A tiny minimalist
  keyboard with a single oversized mechanical keycap. The keycap is glowing
  amber (#F39C12) with the word "TAB" engraved on it in clean white sans-serif
  font, and two small horizontal arrows (⇥ tabulation symbol) above the text.
  The mini keyboard base is sleek dark metallic with subtle teal edge lighting.
   From the key, streams of electric blue code flow upward and outward like a
  fountain, forming elegant arcs of brackets, semicolons and curly braces
  dissolving into particles. A soft teal glow emanates from behind the keyboard
   suggesting AI power. The scene conveys that a single TAB keystroke
  auto-completes entire programs — the essence of vibe coding. No watermarks.
  2:3 portrait aspect ratio. Dark background #1A1A2E.
